description: STATION_ALPHA can only be used by one worker at a time
STATION_BETA can only be used by one worker at a time
STATION_GAMMA can only be used by one worker at a time
Some jobs require a tool from the TOOL_CABINET; the tool must be taken before starting and returned after
INSPECTOR checks one job at a time and sends pass/fail results
If inspection fails, DISPATCHER sends rework order; worker must redo the failed job
Each worker nondeterministically chooses which available workstation to use first
INSPECTOR passes or fails each job inspection
Complete job -> inspection -> pass (proceed) or fail (rework loop)
WORKER_A needs STATION_ALPHA (with tool) and STATION_BETA; WORKER_B needs STATION_BETA (with tool) and STATION_GAMMA; WORKER_C needs STATION_GAMMA (with tool) and STATION_ALPHA
Tool exhaustion: all 2 tools in use while a third worker waits, combined with station contention could stall progress
